instance.description: Specifies the name or ID of the instance that will be associated with the resource. Must be a valid, non-empty string.

instance_group.description: Defines the name or ID of the instance group to which the instance belongs. This is required and cannot be left empty.

timeouts.description: Allows customization of timeouts for creating or deleting the resource. Specify values in string format such as '30m' for 30 minutes.

zone.description: Determines the geographic zone in which the resource will be deployed. Can be null if the zone is specified elsewhere.
